title: SoftBank posts $46 billion gain at Vision Fund driven mainly by massive OpenAI bet
summary_full: SoftBank booked a yearly gain of $46 billion at its Vision Fund driven in large part by the huge rise in value of its investment in OpenAI.
summary_public: SoftBank booked a yearly gain of $46 billion at its Vision Fund driven in large part by the huge rise in value of its investment in OpenAI.
